channel.title: Buienradar on Joost Plattel
channel.description: Recent content in Buienradar on Joost Plattel

item.title: Buienradar plugin for Raycast
item.description:
Simple tools are the best. As I’m living in the Netherlands one of the tools I frequently use is Buienradar, the weather forecast allows me to make a choice on when to hop on a bicycle (or not!). I used their app, the one from RIVM as well, but visiting the website always felt as the least pleasant way of using it.

This afternoon I thought, wouldn’t it be cool to have it in Raycast? A couple of prompts (with both Opencode & Claude) resulted in a super simple Raycast plugin!
